prompt: Create a one-off Sanity migration script that copies seo.title into metaTitle for every post missing metaTitle. Use the repo's env vars and make it reusable for future migrations.
assertions: The output creates or proposes a reusable migration script that reads configuration from environment variables.
The migration defaults to dry-run and requires an explicit execute flag or equivalent for writes.
The script builds targeted patches and does not embed tokens or project secrets.
